con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="PredictiveModelService" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:i0="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata"> <wsdl:import namespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities" location="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?wsdl=wsdl0"/> <wsdl:types/> <wsdl:binding name="pmCustomHttp" type="i0:IPredictiveModelService"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <soap12:operation soapAction="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetRawReportData"> <soap12:operation soapAction="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/GetRawReportData" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RunHealthCheck"> <soap12:operation soapAction="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/RunHealthCheck" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="PredictiveModelService"> <wsdl:port name="pmCustomHttp" binding="tns:pmCustomHttp"> <soap12:address location="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata"> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities/Imports"> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?xsd=xsd0" namespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactor"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:CalculateFactorResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_GetRawReportData_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetRawReportData"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_GetRawReportData_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:GetRawReportDataResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_RunHealthCheck_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RunHealthCheck"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IPredictiveModelService_RunHealthCheck_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RunHealthCheckResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IPredictiveModelService"> <wsdl:operation name="CalculateFactor"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactor" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/CalculateFactorResponse" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_CalculateFactor_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetRawReportData"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/GetRawReportData" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_GetRawReportData_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/GetRawReportDataResponse" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_GetRawReportData_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RunHealthCheck"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/RunHealthCheck" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_RunHealthCheck_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="PredictiveModelService.Entities/IPredictiveModelService/RunHealthCheckResponse" message="tns:IPredictiveModelService_RunHealthCheck_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="PredictiveModelService.Entities" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="PredictiveModelService.Entities"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactor"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsureds" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BatchCounter" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BatchStatus" nillable="true" type="tns:BatchStatus"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegment" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessStartYear" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ChampionRequestDateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ChampionRequestObjId" type="q1:ObjectId" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClueReportId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalEntity" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Locations" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLocation"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfNOICs" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PaymentPlanType" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalCreditScore" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PredictiveModelPolicyID" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorRateIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorLiability" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorProperty" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RequestSource" nillable="true" type="tns:RequestSource"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalReinstatements" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AccountNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimCount" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EffectiveDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExpirationDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InceptionDate" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyStatus" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PredictiveModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ProductName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Source" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubmissionNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:BasePredictiveModelFactorCalcRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="ModelCriteria"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyStatus" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ProductName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TransactionType" type="tns:TransactionType"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"/> <xs:simpleType name="TransactionType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Submission"/> <xs:enumeration value="Renewals"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteWithNewTerm"/> <xs:enumeration value="PolicyChange"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteRemainderOfTheTerm"/> <xs:enumeration value="Cancellation"/> <xs:enumeration value="Reinstatement"/> <xs:enumeration value="RewriteFullTerm"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="TransactionType" nillable="true" type="tns:TransactionType"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="AdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:AdditionalInsured"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfAdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfAdditionalInsured"/> <xs:complexType name="AdditionalInsured"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsuredName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsuredNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="AdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="tns:AdditionalInsured"/> <xs:simpleType name="BatchStatus"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Pending"/> <xs:enumeration value="Failed"/> <xs:enumeration value="Processed"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="BatchStatus" nillable="true" type="tns:BatchStatus"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfLocation"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Location" nillable="true" type="tns:Location"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfLocation" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfLocation"/> <xs:complexType name="Location"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address" nillable="true" type="tns:Address"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Buildings" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBuilding"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LocationNumber" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LocationState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrefillReportId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PropertyID" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Location" nillable="true" type="tns:Location"/> <xs:complexType name="Address"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Address2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="City" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="County" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="State" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Zip" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Address" nillable="true" type="tns:Address"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfBuilding"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Building" nillable="true" type="tns:Building"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfBuilding" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfBuilding"/> <xs:complexType name="Building"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingLimit" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessPersonalPropertyLimit" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NoofStories" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SquareFootage" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearBuilt" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastElectricalUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastHVACUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastPlumbingUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearofLastRoofingUpgrade" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="Building" nillable="true" type="tns:Building"/> <xs:simpleType name="RequestSource"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="PC"/> <xs:enumeration value="Batch"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="RequestSource" nillable="true" type="tns:RequestSource"/> <xs:element name="CalculateFactorResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CalculateFactorResult" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CorelationId" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ModelCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:ModelCriteria"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RateIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TierCapFactorLiability" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TierCapFactorProperty" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:PredictiveModelFactorCalcResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BaseResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:BaseResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfErrorDetail"/> <xs:complexType name="ErrorDetail"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Error" type="tns:ErrorType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <DefaultValue EmitDefaultValue="false" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ErrorInfo" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ErrorDetail" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorDetail"/> <xs:simpleType name="ErrorType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="None"/> <xs:enumeration value="Validation"/> <xs:enumeration value="ServiceError"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="ErrorType" nillable="true" type="tns:ErrorType"/> <xs:element name="GetRawReportData"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:RawReportSearchCriteria"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="RawReportSearchCriteria"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubmissionNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="RawReportSearchCriteria" nillable="true" type="tns:RawReportSearchCriteria"/> <xs:element name="GetRawReportDataResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="GetRawReportDataResult" nillable="true" type="tns:RawReportViewModel"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="RawReportViewModel"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsured" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdditionalInsuredFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="AdjustedNumberOfCompanionClaims" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BOPClaimsFrequency" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BPPExposureGrowth" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BPPExposureGrowthFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BPPExposureRenewingTerm" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankruptcyFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BankruptcyIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BaseState" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingExposureGrowth" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingExposureGrowthFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BuildingExposureRenewingTerm" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegment" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="BusinessSegmentFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CancelReinstatementFactorLoss" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CancelReinstatementFactorRetention" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CancelTypeLookup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ClaimFrequencyGroup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CommercialCreditScore" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CommercialCreditScoreFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CompanionClaimFactorLoss" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CompanionClaimFactorRetention" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CompanionPolicyFactorLoss" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="CompanionPolicyFactorRetention" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EffectiveDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ExpirationDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InceptionDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InterceptFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalEntity" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LegalEntityGroup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LienFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LienIndicator" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LocationFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LossRatioGrade" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="LossRatioScore" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NJMTenureFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfCompanionPolicies" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="NumberOfLocations" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PaymentPlanFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PaymentPlanTypeGroup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalCreditScore" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PersonalCreditScoreFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PolicyTenure" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorBOPAdjustedNumberofClaims" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorBOPClaimFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorLiability" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PriorTierFactorProperty" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RateEffectiveDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RatingModel" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RetentionRatioGrade" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RetentionRatioScore" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SaveDateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SubmissionNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TierFactorLiability" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TierFactorProperty" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TotalWeightedEffBuildingAge" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WeightedEffectiveBuildingAge" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WorkFromHome" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WorkFromHomeFactor" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearsInBusiness" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearsInBusinessFactorLoss" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="YearsInBusinessFactorRetention" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="RawReportViewModel" nillable="true" type="tns:RawReportViewModel"/> <xs:element name="RunHealthCheck"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="request" nillable="true" type="tns:HCRequest"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="HCRequest"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="HCRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:HCRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="BaseRequest"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="BaseRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:BaseRequest"/> <xs:element name="RunHealthCheckResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RunHealthCheckResult" nillable="true" type="tns:HcResponse"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:complexType name="HcResponse"> <xs:complexContent mixed="false"> <xs:extension base="tns:BaseResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="TestResults" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfTestResult"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:extension> </xs:complexContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="HcResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:HcResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="ArrayOfTestResult"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="TestResult" nillable="true" type="tns:TestResult"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ArrayOfTestResult" nillable="true" type="tns:ArrayOfTestResult"/> <xs:complexType name="TestResult"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Message" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Name" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="StackTrace" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Status" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="TestResult" nillable="true" type="tns:TestResult"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/MongoDB.Bson"> <xs:import schemaLocation="http://localhost:41380/PredictiveModelService.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xs:complexType name="ObjectId"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <IsValueType xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/">true</IsValueType> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="_a" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="_b" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="_c" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="ObjectId" nillable="true" type="tns:ObjectId"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema>
